plugins.name: hymme
plugins.description: loop-engineering(NL→EARS→TLA+→Gherkin の3重ループ)と test-design(振る舞い抽出→手法選定→実装橋渡し)の各ルーター+工程スキル、formal-verification(Lean 4 で形式検証)、開発ワークフロースキル群(diff-review / commit-flow / micro-commit / test-targeted / gh-ci-investigate / rebase-flow / reset-flow / pr-create / ledger-flow)と、その toolchain(TLA+/Apalache/make/python3/Lean)を入れる Nix flake。 agents として coder / code-reviewer / diff-reviewer / modeler / prover / loop-engineering-reviewer / test-design-reviewer / formal-verification-reviewer を同梱。
